name: etolucy-skills
description: Reusable Codex skills for due diligence, open-source research, and guided development.

interface.shortDescription: Codex skills for research and guided development.
interface.longDescription: A collection of Codex skills for evidence-backed due diligence, GitHub and Context7-backed open-source research, and learning software development by building real projects.
defaultPrompt: Recommend an open-source GitHub solution for my goal.
Compare open-source alternatives for this project.
Compose several repositories into one practical solution.
Conduct evidence-backed due diligence on a current topic.
Help me build this project while teaching me how and why it works.
